title: Meta Tag Generator
description: Fill in page details to generate SEO, Open Graph and Twitter Card tags with a live social share preview.

notice.title: Generated locally, nothing leaves your browser
notice.body: All tags are produced in real time. Empty fields are skipped, so you can paste the result straight into your page <head>.

title.label: Page title
title.placeholder: e.g. Online Toolbox - Developer productivity tools

description.label: Description
description.placeholder: One sentence summarizing the page, used in search results and share snippets

locale.label: Language / Locale
locale.hint: Open Graph og:locale format, e.g. en_US, zh_CN

preview.heading: Share preview
preview.placeholderTitle: Your page title will appear here
preview.placeholderDesc: Your page description will appear here

warnings.title: Length hints (does not block generation)
warnings.titleLong: Title is {{count}} characters, above the recommended {{max}}; it may be truncated in search results.
warnings.descLong: Description is {{count}} characters, above the recommended {{max}}; it may be truncated in share snippets.

output.heading: Generated tags
output.empty: Fill in any field above to generate copyable HTML tags here.
